title: Stacey's Unauthorized Fuel Ration
description: Corporal Stacey shows you the wood pile at the left parapet fire station: eleven usable pine logs remain, enough for perhaps seventy minutes of full-burn deception. He admits he has been rationing without orders, fearing he would exhaust the supply before the embarkation signal arrived. The right flank station has been drawing from a shared pile and may have less. The Campfire_Decoy_Luminance cannot be maintained at maximum for the full remaining crossing window without resupply from somewhere.
